description: XSStrike is an advanced XSS detection suite. It features a powerful fuzzing engine and an intelligent payload generator.

documentation.how_to_use: Run the primary entrypoint as shown in upstream docs, e.g. `cd toolboxes/XSStrike && python3 XSStrike.py --target $KFIOSA_TARGET_HOST`. Further invocations from upstream: `cd toolboxes/XSStrike && python3 XSStrike.py --help`; `cd toolboxes/XSStrike && python3 XSStrike.py --help`. Advanced XSS detection suite (fuzzing, crawler, ...).
documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'any' phase against surfaces [web] in the exploit category. Fits when the engagement needs: Advanced XSS detection suite (fuzzing, crawler, ...).
documentation.why_to_use: Prefer this tool because: Advanced XSS detection suite (fuzzing, crawler, ...).
